seo.title: Online Ordering System for Restaurants — from €79 | Gastro Master
seo.description: Digital ordering system for restaurants from €79/month — 0% commission, custom branding. Independent from delivery platforms. Get a free consultation now.

hero.subtitle: From €79 per month. Instantly online. No app download required. Custom domain. Your customers order directly — 0% commission, 100% your revenue.

features.headline: What your Gastro Master shop can do.
features.sub: Your online shop — with your name, your branding and the features restaurateurs actually need every day. No app download, works directly in the browser.

cards.title: Your own ordering page
cards.text: Your customers order directly on your site — e.g. pizza-xyz.com/order. No app, no third-party detour.

cards.title: No app download needed
cards.text: The shop opens directly in the browser — on smartphone, tablet or desktop. Just share the link, done.

cards.title: Delivery & pickup
cards.text: Your customers choose: delivered to their door or picked up at the restaurant. You set delivery zones and opening hours yourself.

cards.title: Multi-location & branches
cards.text: Multiple locations? No problem. Manage all branches centrally from one interface — ideal for franchise concepts.

cards.title: Online payment
cards.text: Apple Pay, Google Pay, credit card and PayPal — all common payment methods directly in the shop. Secure, fast, no detours.

cards.title: Custom branding
cards.text: Your logo, your colors, your name — the shop appears entirely under your brand. 0% Gastro Master visible to your customers.

cards.title: Self-managed menu
cards.text: Change prices, items and categories anytime in real-time — no developer needed, no waiting for support.

seo_section.headline: If you're not online, you're losing revenue every day.
seo_section.sub: 9 out of 10 customers search for a restaurant on Google before they order. Restaurants without their own ordering page are invisible to these customers — and lose daily orders to competitors who are present online. With your Gastro Master shop, you change that.

stats.desc: of customers search for a restaurant on Google before ordering
more orders for restaurants with their own online ordering page compared to those without
of all Google clicks go to the first result — your SEO-optimized shop helps you get there

seo_section.sources: Sources: Think with Google Consumer Insights, Statista Online Food Delivery Outlook Germany 2025

bullets.title: SEO-optimized ordering page
bullets.text: Your shop is fully indexable by Google — with title tags, meta descriptions and structured data. Customers find you directly through search.

bullets.title: Google Business Profile
bullets.text: We help you optimize your Google Business listing so customers can click directly to your ordering page from Google Search.

bullets.title: Custom domain
bullets.text: Your ordering page under your own address — e.g. pizza-xyz.com/order. A custom domain builds trust and improves your Google ranking.

compare.headline: All advantages at a glance.
compare.sub: Selling through Lieferando, Wolt or Uber Eats costs up to 30% commission — every month, automatically, without negotiation. With Gastro Master, you keep 100% of your revenue.

SEO-optimized — your shop gets found on Google

testimonials.headline: 800+ restaurateurs already take orders directly online.

steps.headline: Your own shop in 3 steps.
steps.sub: From consultation to your first online order — we guide you personally.

items.title: Free consultation
items.text: We discuss together how your shop should look: name, logo, colors, menu, delivery zones and payment methods. No tech knowledge required.

items.title: We set everything up
items.text: Our team configures your shop, sets up your branding and makes sure everything runs smoothly. You don't need to code anything.

items.title: Live — customers order directly
items.text: Within a few business days your shop is live. Customers order directly via the link — no download, 0% commission, 100% your revenue.

pricing.headline: Everything included. No hidden costs.
pricing.sub: One fixed monthly fee — no commission, no minimum term, no dependency.

addons.title: iOS & Android App
addons.text: Upgrade to the full app solution: your own app appears under your name in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. Together with the shop for €149/month.

addons.title: Professional Website
addons.text: Your digital calling card — a standalone restaurant website with image gallery, contact form and Google Maps. Informs visitors while the shop takes orders.

addons.title: Transaction Fee Pass-Through
addons.text: Payment processing fees are not borne by you as the operator — but by your customer. The fee is transparently displayed at checkout.

teamCta.headline:
Ready for your own
online ordering shop?
teamCta.expectText: In a free initial consultation, one of our experts develops an individual concept for your own online ordering shop — with your branding, your menu and 0% commission. Non-binding and completely free.
teamCta.expectSub: Your shop can be live within a few business days. No programming skills needed — we handle everything.

faq.headline: Everything you need to know about the Gastro Master shop.

items.q: Do I need my own domain for my shop?
items.a: No, a custom domain is not required. You can start your shop directly via a Gastro Master subdomain. However, if you'd like to use your own domain — e.g. pizza-xyz.com/order — we'll set that up for you. A custom domain strengthens your branding and improves your Google ranking.

items.q: Can I change the menu at any time?
items.a: Yes. Prices, dishes, categories and availability can be changed anytime via the simple backend in real-time — no coding skills needed and no waiting. No ticket, no support required.

Your shop supports all common payment methods: Apple Pay, Google Pay, credit card (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal and Klarna. Transaction fees can optionally be passed to the customer via the transaction fee pass-through.

items.q: How long does the setup take?
items.a: Setup typically takes 3–7 business days. During this time, we configure your design, menu, delivery zones and payment methods together. You don't need to code anything — we handle everything.

items.q: Is there a minimum contract term?
items.a: The shop is cancellable monthly with 3 months notice. There are no hidden fees and no commission per order. Just the fixed monthly fee from €79 (net). You can find an overview of all packages on the [pricing page](/preise).

items.q: What's the difference between shop and app?
items.a: The shop opens directly in the browser — your customers don't need to download anything. The [branded ordering app](/produkte/app) appears under your name in the Apple App Store and Google Play Store. Both products use the same ordering system. Many of our clients start with the shop and upgrade to the app later. Shop + App together from €149/month.

items.q: Do you help with getting found on Google?
items.a: Yes. Your shop is technically SEO-optimized — with title tags, meta descriptions and structured data that Google understands. We also support you in setting up or optimizing your Google Business Profile so customers can access your shop directly from Google Search.
